DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
Tag: LCC-MS8-L4-1400P-MSELA8-MCF-CFI-02

The Birria Ramen Label

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: According to the boy, why does his cousin read the small print first?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a full justification of how the menu's text features communicate distinct messages to distinct audiences and explain why that design serves both selling and protecting.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS RI.8.5  |  MS ELA Grade 8: Text Features in Consumer Materials
